mapper.select: SELECT id, invocation_id, tenant_id, tool_id, conversation_id, message_id, execution_id, input_json, output_json, status, duration_ms, error_message, created_at FROM t_tool_invocation_log WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_tool_invocation_log WHERE tool_id = #{toolId}

SELECT id, invocation_id, tenant_id, tool_id, conversation_id, message_id, execution_id, input_json, output_json, status, duration_ms, error_message, created_at FROM t_tool_invocation_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_tool_invocation_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
